title: EXAMPLE candidate forum on housing (placeholder sample data)

statements.summary: Would legalize apartments in every ward and end single-family-only zoning.
statements.quote: We can't say we want affordability and then ban apartments in half the city.

statements.summary: Supports expanding the housing trust fund but wants an audit of existing spending first.
statements.quote: I'll grow the trust fund, but not before we account for the dollars already out the door.

statements.summary: Opposes citywide upzoning; favors keeping land-use decisions with local aldermen.
statements.quote: Neighborhoods, not City Hall, should decide what gets built on their blocks.
